name: apple-carousel
title: apple-carousel
description: An interactive carousel component recreated from the apple website.

files.content:
import { CarouselBody, CarouselContent, CarousalList, CarouselTrigger, } from '@/components/carousals/apple-carousal' interface ResponsivePictureProps { src: string alt: string className?: string imgClassName?: string } function ResponsivePicture({ src, alt, className, imgClassName, }: ResponsivePictureProps) { return (
) } export function AppleCarouselDemo() { return ( Colours : The most colourful MacBook line-up ever. Choose from four stunning colours with colour-coordinated keyboards Durable design : MacBook Neo is made with a durable recycled aluminium enclosure that helps it reach 60% recycled content by weight, the most ever in any Apple product. Display : With outstanding resolution and 500 nits of brightness, the 33.02cm. Liquid Retina display brings photos, websites and video to life. Touch ID : The model with Touch ID lets you easily unlock your MacBook Neo, sign in to websites and apps and download apps with the touch of you finger. Camera : The 1080p FaceTime HD camera gives you a clear and crisp appearance on video calls. Mics and speakers : Two side-firing speakers deliver immersive sound, and dual microphones isolate and enhance your voice for crystal clarity ) }
